author: desiderium-wav
name: Nuke
description: Owner-only dangerous command for resetting a server. Deletes all channels and non-admin roles while preserving admin roles and members. Includes confirmation prompt.
install_msg: Nuke cog loaded successfully. WARNING: This cog provides owner-only destructive commands.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any end user data.
usage: Use [p]nuke in a server to trigger a server reset (owner only, requires confirmation).
